# fly_tigris_buckets (Data Source)

Lists Fly.io Tigris storage buckets.

## Example Usage

```terraform
data "fly_tigris_buckets" "all" {}

output "bucket_names" {
  value = [for b in data.fly_tigris_buckets.all.buckets : b.name]
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Read-Only

- `buckets` (Attributes List) The list of Tigris buckets. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--buckets))

<a id="nestedatt--buckets"></a>
### Nested Schema for `buckets`

Read-Only:

- `id` (String) Bucket ID.
- `name` (String) Bucket name.
- `public` (Boolean) Whether the bucket is public.
